global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with bold text and decorative elements.
global.main_message: Promoting the NeonCast service with a call to action.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The text 'NeonCast' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top, conveying a strong brand identity.

elements.label: Binge starts now
elements.description: The phrase 'Binge starts now' is written in white, bold font, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, light-colored circle is placed in the center, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle is positioned below the small circle, providing a visual balance.

elements.label: Large oval
elements.description: A large oval shape is located below the medium rectangle, enhancing the visual interest of the ad.

elements.label: Small dots
elements.description: Three small dots are arranged in a line, adding a playful element to the design.

elements.label: Cancel anytime
elements.description: The text 'Cancel anytime' is displayed in smaller font beneath the main message, providing additional information.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent 'Book now' button is located at the bottom, encouraging immediate action from viewers.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bold and playful, NeonCast, Binge starts now, Book now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, NeonCast, Book now
